message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting and derive Default macro

Applies automatic code formatting via rustfmt and simplifies Default
implementation using derive macro instead of manual impl.

Changes:
• Import reordering (cargo fmt standard)
• Line wrapping for long warn! statements
• Derive Default for NeuroflowActivationKind (removes manual impl)
• Simplified NullPersistence construction

No functional changes - formatting only.
